channel.title: Docs on shenzaoyi`blog
channel.description: Recent content in Docs on shenzaoyi`blog

item.description: OS # Linux Syscall Implement # privilege - HardWare Design CS: code , last two bit, CPL DS: date, last two bit, RPL DPL : destination privilege level check : if CPL < DPL or CPL = DPL; RPL < DPL or RPL = DPL Interupt for Intel x86, INT INTERUPT #define __LIBRARY__ #include <unistd.h> _syscall3(int,write,int,fd,const char *,buf,off_t,count) Vsyscall & Vdso # also look this Reference # Linux 核心設計: System call
resemble 类似 they resemble library APIs demonstrate v. 证明
